title: Arvind Kejriwal hails ‘zabardast jeet’ of AAP in Punjab civic polls, calls BJP ‘ED party’
description: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) achieved a significant victory in the 2026 Punjab municipal elections, winning 698 wards. In Gidderbaha, AAP won 17 out of 19 wards, while the Congress secured only two. Chief Minister Mann thanked voters for their support, highlighting good governance.
